zh.Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒
zh.Titchmarsh, Thrapston, Northamptonshire,: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒
zh.Minster Lovell, Witney, Oxfordshire, Eng: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lovel於1433年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒時，他的父親Lord William Lovell Holland VII37歲，母親Alice Deincourt32歲。他於1450年與Joan Beaumont在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1465年1月9日在英國奧可福爾維特尼享年32歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Minster Lovell, Witney, Oxfordshire, Eng: 英国英格兰奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lovel于1433年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒时，他的父亲Lord William Lovell Holland VII37岁，母亲Alice Deincourt32岁。他于1450年与Joan Beaumont在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1465年1月9日在英国奧可福爾維特尼享年32岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Lovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Lovel was born in 1433, in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Lord William Lovell Holland VII, was 37 and his mother, Alice Deincourt, was 32. He married Joan Beaumont in 1450, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 January 1465, in Witney, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 32, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lovel est né en 1433, à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord William Lovell Holland VII, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice Deincourt, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan Beaumont en 1450, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1465, à Witney, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.Minster Lovell, Witney, Oxfordshire, Eng: Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Lovel 1433 in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord William Lovell Holland VII 37 und seine Mutter Alice Deincourt 32. Er hat 1450 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Januar 1465 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Witney, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lovel è nato il nel 1433 nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Lord William Lovell Holland VII, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Alice Deincourt, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan Beaumont nel 1450, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1465, nel Witney, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.Minster Lovell, Witney, Oxfordshire, Eng: イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアミンスター ロベル
ja.lifeSummary: John Lovelが1433年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュで生まれた時，父Lord William Lovell Holland VIIは37歳，母Alice Deincourtは32歳であった。1450年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでJoan Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1465年1月9日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウィトニーで32歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lovel(이)가 1433년 영국 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord William Lovell Holland VII(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Deincourt(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Joan Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1465년 1월 9일 영국 스퍼드실르 윗니에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.Minster Lovell, Witney, Oxfordshire, Eng: Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lovel nasceu em 1433, em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William Lovell Holland VII, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice Deincourt, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Beaumont em 1450, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1465, em Witney, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ro.Minster Lovell, Witney, Oxfordshire, Eng: Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lovel родился в 1433 г. в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord William Lovell Holland VII было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Deincourt, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Beaumont в 1450 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 января 1465 г. в местности витни, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lovel nació en 1433, en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William Lovell Holland VII, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alice Deincourt, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan Beaumont en 1450, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1465, en Witney, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
